content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented force-complete amendment preservation. The engine now persists the final-review aggregate on round-budget force-completion, emits force_complete_amendments_deferred when accepted amendments are deferred, records force-complete metadata on run_completed, updates status/tail summaries, and routes force-completed propose_new_bead amendments through the bead follow-up creation path while leaving other classifications journaled.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect workflow force-complete, final-review aggregate, journal, status/tail, and success-reconciliation paths.
2. [Completed] Add force_complete_amendments_deferred journal event and run_completed force-complete metadata helpers.
3. [Completed] Change the max_completion_rounds force-complete path to persist the aggregate, journal deferred amendments, complete the run, and preserve operator-visible status text.
4. [Completed] Surface force-complete deferred amendment summaries in run status and run tail --logs.
5. [Completed] Add reconciliation handling so force-completed propose_new_bead amendments create follow-up beads through BrMutationAdapter, while mixed non-proposal classifications remain journal-only.
6. [Completed] Add regression coverage for non-empty, empty, mixed classification, CLI surfacing, and br follow-up creation scenarios.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop --command cargo test --features test-stub --locked passed.
- nix develop --command cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passed.
- nix develop --command cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix build passed.
- Targeted regression tests for force-complete journal emission, empty amendments, mixed classifications, CLI status/tail surfacing, and propose_new_bead follow-up creation passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- br lint could not be run because br is not installed in PATH or the nix dev shell.
- The working tree already contained unrelated .beads, prompt, and .ralph-burning state changes when this stage began; they were not part of this implementation scope.
